$comment: Controlled vocabulary for setpoint and condition quantities. Each entry maps an authoring key to an EMMO quantity class (prefLabel; resolved by the remote EMMO battery @context) and the relation predicate it is attached under (hasControlParameter for setpoints, hasProperty for ambient conditions). IRIs that are already pinned in jsonld.py are recorded here as compact IRIs; the rest resolve via the remote context. Quantities flagged generic carry an rdfs:label because the EMMO class is non-specific.
